title: spermacoce scaberrima
intro: Spermacoce scaberrima, also known as rough buttonweed or rough spermacoce, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. Its medicinal properties include antioxidant and anti-arthritic effects, and it is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing infections. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
